CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_content', false, 'tyRP2liZLdl4YQ5vwXQ3HxrO_78wssE4Yztokuw3H9s', 'v3.5.0--OnU8c0X5GELNXoG6GwJn6qva6pl4zshZarGSwuBxkGQ', 'oIZIwWONpHqZ4lDyx5De_dw6zIFMHELY0lpnVHbKYA8'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_content; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_content (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "author" VARCHAR NULL, "body" TEXT, "category" TEXT NULL, "cover" VARCHAR NULL, "date" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "excerpt" VARCHAR NULL, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "readingTime" INT NULL, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "tags" TEXT NULL, "toc" BOOLEAN NULL, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/blog/hello-nuxt4.md', '使用 Nuxt 4 构建现代化博客', '博主', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"引言"},"引言"],["p",{},"Nuxt 4 带来了许多令人兴奋的改进，包括更好的性能、更简洁的配置和更强大的内容管理能力。本文将带你了解如何使用最新的技术栈构建一个现代化的博客系统。"],["h2",{"id":"为什么选择-nuxt-4"},"为什么选择 Nuxt 4？"],["h3",{"id":"_1-性能优化"},"1. 性能优化"],["p",{},"Nuxt 4 基于 Nitro INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/blog/nuxt4-app-directory.md', 'Nuxt 4 项目结构解析：app 目录到底解决了什么问题？', NULL, '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"前言为什么关注-nuxt-4-项目结构"},"前言：为什么关注 Nuxt 4 项目结构"],["p",{},"最近在看 Nuxt 4 的文档，发现项目结构有了不小的变化。"],["p",{},"Nuxt 3 的目录结构其实已经挺方便了，但在实际项目中确实会遇到一些问题："],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"文件分散"],"：pages、layouts、components 各自为政，找文件得切来切去"],["li",{},["strong",{},"逻辑耦合"],"：自定义路由和状态管理经常混在一起，不好拆分"],["li",{},["strong",{},"复用困难"],"：组件跨目录引用时路径写得乱七八糟"]],["p",{},"Nuxt 4 引入了 ",["code",{},"app"]," 目录，官方说是为了 \"统一约定\"。但我觉得背后有更深层的架构思考。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"nuxt-3-nuxt-4-的变化"},"Nuxt 3 → Nuxt 4 的变化"],["p",{},"先直观对比一下："],["table",{},["thead",{},["tr",{},["th",{},"方面"],["th",{},"Nuxt 3"],["th",{},"Nuxt 4"]]],["tbody",{},["tr",{},["td",{},"核心目录"],["td",{},"pages / layouts / components / composables 等平铺"],["td",{},["code",{},"app/"]," 目录统一承载核心结构"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"路由逻辑"],["td",{},"基于 ",["code",{},"pages/"]," 自动生成"],["td",{},["code",{},"app/pages/"]," 同样自动生成，但结构更清晰"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"布局管理"],["td",{},["code",{},"layouts/"]," 独立目录"],["td",{},["code",{},"app/layouts/"]," 统一管理"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"项目扩展"],["td",{},"需要额外约定"],["td",{},["code",{},"app/"]," 目录提供标准化扩展点"]]]],["p",{},"表面上看是搬家，实际上 Nuxt 团队在尝试解决一个老问题：",["strong",{},"约定与灵活的平衡"],"。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"app-目录到底解决了什么"},"app 目录到底解决了什么"],["h3",{"id":"_1-统一核心结构"},"1. 统一核心结构"],["p",{},"以前打开一个 Nuxt 项目，根目录一堆文件夹："],["pre",{"className":["language-text"],"code":"project/\n├── pages/          # 页面\n├── layouts/        # 布局\n├── components/     # 组件\n├── composables/    # 组合式函数\n├── middleware/     # 中间件\n├── plugins/        # 插件\n└── ...             # 还有其他\n","language":"text"},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},"project/\n├── pages/          # 页面\n├── layouts/        # 布局\n├── components/     # 组件\n├── composables/    # 组合式函数\n├── middleware/     # 中间件\n├── plugins/        # 插件\n└── ...             # 还有其他\n"]],["p",{},"现在核心逻辑都收进 ",["code",{},"app/"],"："],["pre",{"className":["language-text"],"code":"project/\n├── app/            # 核心应用逻辑\n│   ├── pages/\n│   ├── layouts/\n│   ├── components/\n│   ├── composables/\n│   ├── middleware/\n│   └── plugins/\n├── content/        # 内容（如博客文章）\n├── public/         # 静态资源\n└── server/         # 服务端 API\n","language":"text"},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},"project/\n├── app/            # 核心应用逻辑\n│   ├── pages/\n│   ├── layouts/\n│   ├── components/\n│   ├── composables/\n│   ├── middleware/\n│   └── plugins/\n├── content/        # 内容（如博客文章）\n├── public/         # 静态资源\n└── server/         # 服务端 API\n"]],["p",{},"好处很明显："],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"一眼看清"],"：哪些是应用核心，哪些是周边资源"],["li",{},["strong",{},"降低认知"],"：新人接手项目时，先看 ",["code",{},"app/"]," 就够了"],["li",{},["strong",{},"减少冲突"],"：第三方模块、工具配置和核心代码分离"]],["h3",{"id":"_2-利于大型项目维护"},"2. 利于大型项目维护"],["p",{},["code",{},"app"]," 目录的设计借鉴了其他框架的经验："],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Next.js 13+"]," 的 ",["code",{},"app/"]," 目录"],["li",{},["strong",{},"SvelteKit"]," 的 ",["code",{},"src/routes/"]],["li",{},["strong",{},"Remix"]," 的 ",["code",{},"app/"]]],["p",{},"这种 \"把核心收拢\" 的思路，本质上是 ",["strong",{},"按关注点分离"],"："],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"app/"]," = 应用逻辑（变化频繁）"],["li",{},["code",{},"content/"]," = 内容数据（独立管理）"],["li",{},["code",{},"public/"]," = 静态资源（很少变动）"],["li",{},["code",{},"server/"]," = 服务端逻辑（前后端分离）"]],["h3",{"id":"_3-约定优于配置的延伸"},"3. 约定优于配置的延伸"],["p",{},"Nuxt 一直推崇 \"约定优于配置\"，但 Nuxt 3 的约定散落在多个目录。Nuxt 4 把约定收进 ",["code",{},"app/"],"，让这套规则更内聚。"],["p",{},"举个例子："],["pre",{"className":"language-typescript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"// Nuxt 3：自动导入要扫描多个目录\nautoImports: {\n  dirs: [''composables'', ''utils'', ''stores'']\n}\n\n// Nuxt 4：统一从 app/ 扫描\nautoImports: {\n  dirs: [''app/composables'', ''app/utils'']\n}\n","language":"typescript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// Nuxt 3：自动导入要扫描多个目录\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"autoImports"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},": {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"  dirs"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},": ["],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''composables''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''utils''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''stores''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"]\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"}\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// Nuxt 4：统一从 app/ 扫描\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"autoImports"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},": {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"  dirs"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},": ["],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''app/composables''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''app/utils''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"]\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"}\n"]]]],["p",{},"配置少了，心智负担就轻了。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"面试怎么聊这个话题"},"面试怎么聊这个话题"],["p",{},"如果面试官问 \"你了解 Nuxt 4 的新特性吗？\""],["p",{},["strong",{},"初级回答"],"："],["blockquote",{},["p",{},"\"Nuxt 4 引入了 app 目录，把 pages、layouts 这些都放进去，结构更清晰。\""]],["p",{},["strong",{},"进阶回答"],"："],["blockquote",{},["p",{},"\"Nuxt 4 的 app 目录是架构层面的优化，不只是搬家。它解决了大型项目中文件分散、约定不统一的问题，让核心逻辑更内聚。这种设计借鉴了 Next.js 13 的经验，体现了框架设计中的关注点分离原则。\""]],["p",{},["strong",{},"加分点"],"："],["ul",{},["li",{},"提到 \"约定优于配置\" 的设计哲学"],["li",{},"对比其他框架（Next.js、SvelteKit）的类似设计"],["li",{},"结合自己的项目经验，说明实际收益"]],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"总结"},"总结"],["p",{},"Nuxt 4 的 ",["code",{},"app"]," 目录不是简单的 \"搬家\"，而是架构层面的优化："],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"统一核心"],"：把应用逻辑收拢，降低认知成本"],["li",{},["strong",{},"分离关注点"],"：核心代码、内容、资源、服务端各司其职"],["li",{},["strong",{},"利于扩展"],"：为未来功能预留标准化位置"]],["p",{},"对于个人项目，这种变化可能感知不强。但对于团队协作和大型项目，",["code",{},"app"]," 目录的设计能显著降低维护成本。"],["p",{},"如果你正在用 Nuxt 3，建议提前了解这个变化。新项目直接用 Nuxt 4 的话，推荐按 ",["code",{},"app/"]," 结构来组织代码。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"参考"},"参考"],["ul",{},["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://nuxt.com/docs/getting-started/upgrade","rel":["nofollow"]},"Nuxt 4 迁移指南"]],["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://nextjs.org/docs/app","rel":["nofollow"]},"Next.js 13 App Router"]],["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://kit.svelte.dev/docs/project-structure","rel":["nofollow"]},"SvelteKit 项目结构"]]],["hr",{}],["p",{},"有问题欢迎在评论区交流，或者发邮件给我。"],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .sAwPA, html code.shiki .sAwPA{--shiki-default:#6A737D}html pre.shiki code .svObZ, html code.shiki .svObZ{--shiki-default:#B392F0}html pre.shiki code .s95oV, html code.shiki .s95oV{--shiki-default:#E1E4E8}html pre.shiki code .sU2Wk, html code.shiki .sU2Wk{--shiki-default:#9ECBFF}html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}"]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"前言为什么关注-nuxt-4-项目结构","depth":2,"text":"前言：为什么关注 Nuxt 4 项目结构"},{"id":"nuxt-3-nuxt-4-的变化","depth":2,"text":"Nuxt 3 → Nuxt 4 的变化"},{"id":"app-目录到底解决了什么","depth":2,"text":"app 目录到底解决了什么","children":[{"id":"_1-统一核心结构","depth":3,"text":"1. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/blog/nuxt4-blog-architecture.md', '从 0 到上线：我的 Nuxt 4 技术博客架构拆解', NULL, '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"作为一个前端开发实习生，我最近完成了一个 ",["strong",{},"基于 Nuxt 4 + Vue 3 的个人技术博客"],"。"],["p",{},"这篇文章记录了我的设计思路、架构选择以及踩过的坑，希望对大家参考或者面试分享有所帮助。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"_1-为什么选择-nuxt-4"},"1. 为什么选择 Nuxt 4"],["p",{},"当时选择 Nuxt 4 的原因主要有三个："],["h3",{"id":"_11-文件路由-ssrssg-支持"},"1.1 文件路由 + SSR/SSG 支持"],["ul",{},["li",{},"首页、博客列表、文章详情页都可以通过约定路由快速生成"],["li",{},"SSR 对 SEO 很友好，静态站点生成（SSG）则减少构建压力"]],["h3",{"id":"_12-nitro-服务器引擎"},"1.2 Nitro 服务器引擎"],["ul",{},["li",{},"默认打包成 Node 或静态输出"],["li",{},"方便部署到 Vercel/Netlify，未来扩展性好"]],["h3",{"id":"_13-typescript-完全支持"},"1.3 TypeScript 完全支持"],["ul",{},["li",{},"保证类型安全，尤其是文章数据结构变化时可以立刻发现错误"],["li",{},"集中类型定义方便维护"]],["blockquote",{},["p",{},"如果是纯 Vue 3，我会自己搭建路由和 SSR，但 Nuxt 4 省了很多重复造轮子。"]],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"_2-博客内容管理"},"2. schema，类型检查自动生效"]],["h3",{"id":"_23-踩过的坑"},"2.3 踩过的坑"],["p",{},"刚开始用的时候，发现 ",["code",{},"queryCollection(''content'')"]," 返回的数据类型是 总结"],["p",{},"这次搭建博客最大的收获不是技术本身，而是 ",["strong",{},"技术选型的权衡"],"。"],["p",{},"比如："],["ul",{},["li",{},"用 Nuxt Content 而不是 CMS，牺牲了后台编辑的便利性，换来了部署简单"],["li",{},"用极简设计而不是通用模板，牺牲了\"大众审美\"，换来了个人风格"],["li",{},"用 TypeScript 而不是纯 JS，牺牲了开发速度，换来了长期维护性"]],["p",{},"没有绝对的好坏，只有适合不适合。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"参考链接"},"参考链接"],["ul",{},["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://nuxt.com/","rel":["nofollow"]},"Nuxt 4 INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/blog/vue-36-features.md', 'Vue 3.6 新特性详解', NULL, '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"vue-36-的主要更新"},"Vue 3.6 的主要更新"],["p",{},"Vue 3.6 专注于性能优化和开发者体验改进。本文将详细介绍主要的新特性和改进。"],["h2",{"id":"响应式系统优化"},"响应式系统优化"],["p",{},"Vue 3.6 对响应式系统进行了深度优化，主要包括："],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"更快的依赖收集"],"：优化了 track 和 trigger 的逻辑"],["li",{},["strong",{},"更少的内存占用"],"：改进了内部数据结构"],["li",{},["strong",{},"更好的 TypeScript 支持"],"：改进了类型推断"]],["h2",{"id":"新的-api"},"新的 API"],["h3",{"id":"useid"},["code",{},"useId()"]],["p",{},"生成唯一的 ID，适合用于表单元素和无障碍属性："],["pre",{"className":"language-vue shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"<script setup>\nconst id = useId()\n</script>\n\n<template>\n  <label :for=\"id\">用户名</label>\n  <input :id=\"id\" type=\"text\" />\n</template>\n","language":"vue","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"<"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"script"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," setup"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},">\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," id"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," useId"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"()\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"</"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"script"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},">\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"<"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"template"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},">\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  <"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"label"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," :for"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"="],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"\"id\""],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},">用户名</"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"label"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},">\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  <"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"input"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," :id"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"="],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"\"id\""],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," type"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"="],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"\"text\""],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," />\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"</"],["span",{"class":"s4JwU"},"template"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},">\n"]]]],["h2",{"id":"性能基准测试"},"性能基准测试"],["p",{},"根据官方测试，Vue 3.6 在以下方面有所提升："],["table",{},["thead",{},["tr",{},["th",{},"指标"],["th",{},"改进幅度"]]],["tbody",{},["tr",{},["td",{},"初始化时间"],["td",{},"15%"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"更新性能"],["td",{},"20%"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"内存占用"],["td",{},"10%"]]]],["h2",{"id":"迁移指南"},"迁移指南"],["p",{},"从 Vue 3.5 升级到 3.6 非常简单，只需更新依赖："],["pre",{"className":"language-bash shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"npm install vue@latest\n","language":"bash","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"npm"],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"}," install"],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"}," vue@latest\n"]]]],["p",{},"大多数项目无需修改代码即可直接运行。"],["h2",{"id":"总结"},"总结"],["p",{},"Vue 3.6 是一个注重性能和开发者体验的版本，值得升级使用。"],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .s95oV, html code.shiki .s95oV{--shiki-default:#E1E4E8}html pre.shiki code .s4JwU, html code.shiki .s4JwU{--shiki-default:#85E89D}html pre.shiki code .svObZ, html code.shiki .svObZ{--shiki-default:#B392F0}html '2025-02-08', '探索 Vue 3.6 带来的性能改进和开发体验优化', NULL, 'md', '{}', 'true', '/blog/vue-36-features', 5, '{"title":"Vue 3.6 新特性详解","description":"探索 Vue 3.6 带来的性能改进和开发体验优化"}', 'blog/vue-36-features', '["Vue","JavaScript"]', NULL, 'euH_R1cegC5CAHg0XP3yE3F_VpU6H5kktkklVkNGbPU'); -- euH_R1cegC5CAHg0XP3yE3F_VpU6H5kktkklVkNGbPU
INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/blog/vue3-reactive-principle.md', '从 Vue 3.6 响应式原理，看 ref 和 reactive 的真实区别', NULL, '{"type":"minimark","value":[["h2",{"id":"前言"},"前言"],["p",{},"Vue 3 的响应式系统彻底重写了 Vue 2，用 Proxy + Reflect 实现了更灵活、高效的响应式。"],["p",{},"在日常开发中，我们会用 ",["code",{},"reactive"]," 和 ",["code",{},"ref"]," 来管理状态，但很多人只会用，不明白原理。面试时被问到 \"为什么 reactive 解构会丢失响应性？\" 就答不上来。"],["p",{},"本文带你从底层理解两者的真实区别。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"proxy-原理概览"},"Proxy 原理概览"],["p",{},"Vue 3 核心依赖 Proxy 来拦截对象操作："],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"const state = reactive({ count: 0 });\n\neffect(() => {\n  console.log(state.count); // track 收集依赖\n});\n\nstate.count++; // trigger 触发更新\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," state"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({ count: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," });\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"effect"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"(() "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"=>"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  console."],["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"log"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"(state.count); "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// track 收集依赖\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"});\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"state.count"],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"++"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// trigger 触发更新\n"]]]],["p",{},["strong",{},"核心机制："]],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"track"],"：当访问属性时，收集依赖（effect）"],["li",{},["strong",{},"trigger"],"：当属性变化时，触发依赖更新"]],["p",{},"这个机制保证了视图和数据的同步，同时性能比 Vue 2 的 ",["code",{},"Object.defineProperty"]," 高很多。"],["h3",{"id":"为什么-proxy-更好"},"为什么 Proxy 更好？"],["p",{},"Vue 2 的 ",["code",{},"Object.defineProperty"]," 有几个硬伤："],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"无法监听新增属性"]," - 必须用 ",["code",{},"Vue.set"]],["li",{},["strong",{},"无法监听数组索引"]," - 数组操作受限"],["li",{},["strong",{},"深度递归性能差"]," - 初始化时遍历所有属性"]],["p",{},"Proxy 直接代理整个对象，没有这些限制。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"reactive-vs-ref"},"reactive vs ref"],["h3",{"id":"reactive"},"reactive"],["p",{},"特点："],["ul",{},["li",{},"只能包对象（数组也是对象）"],["li",{},"返回一个深层 Proxy"],["li",{},"自动递归处理对象属性的响应式"],["li",{},["strong",{},"解构会丢失响应性"]]],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"const state = reactive({ count: 0 });\nconst { count } = state;\n\ncount++; // ❌ 不再响应，因为解构出来的是普通值\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," state"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({ count: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," });\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," { "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"count"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," } "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," state;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"count"],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"++"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ❌ 不再响应，因为解构出来的是普通值\n"]]]],["p",{},["strong",{},"为什么会这样？"]],["p",{},"因为 ",["code",{},"reactive"]," 返回的是 Proxy 对象，解构时 ",["code",{},"const { count } = state"]," 相当于 ",["code",{},"const count = state.count"],"，这时候 ",["code",{},"count"]," 只是一个数字 0，和 Proxy 没关系了。"],["h3",{"id":"ref"},"ref"],["p",{},"特点："],["ul",{},["li",{},"可以包任意类型（对象、数组、原始值）"],["li",{},"内部通过 ",["code",{},".value"]," 访问"],["li",{},"getter/setter 处理 track/trigger"],["li",{},["strong",{},"解构不会丢失响应性"],"（只要保持引用）"]],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"const num = ref(0);\nnum.value++; // ✅ 响应式正常\n\n// 解构也可以\nconst { value } = num;\nvalue++; // ❌ 这样不行，value 是原始值\n\n// 正确做法\nconst numRef = ref(0);\nconst update = () => {\n  numRef.value++; // ✅ 始终保持引用\n};\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," num"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"num.value"],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"++"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ✅ 响应式正常\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 解构也可以\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," { "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"value"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," } "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," num;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"value"],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"++"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ❌ 这样不行，value 是原始值\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 正确做法\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," numRef"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," update"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," () "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"=>"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  numRef.value"],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"++"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ✅ 始终保持引用\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"};\n"]]]],["p",{},["strong",{},"ref 的内部实现："]],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"// 简化版\nfunction ref(value) {\n  return {\n    get value() {\n      track(this, ''value''); // 收集依赖\n      return value;\n    },\n    set value(newVal) {\n      value = newVal;\n      trigger(this, ''value''); // 触发更新\n    }\n  };\n}\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 简化版\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"function"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"s9osk"},"value"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},") {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"  return"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"    get"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," value"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"() {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"      track"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"this"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''value''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"); "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 收集依赖\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"      return"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," value;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"    },\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"    set"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," value"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"s9osk"},"newVal"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},") {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"      value "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," newVal;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"      trigger"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"this"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''value''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"); "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 触发更新\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"    }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  };\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"}\n"]]]],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"保持-reactive-解构响应性"},"保持 reactive 解构响应性"],["p",{},"如果确实需要解构，用 ",["code",{},"toRefs"],"："],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"const state = reactive({ count: 0, name: ''Vue'' });\nconst { count, name } = toRefs(state);\n\ncount.value++; // ✅ 响应式正常\nname.value = ''React''; // ✅ 同样有效\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," state"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({ count: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", name: "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''Vue''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," });\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," { "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"count"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},", "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"name"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," } "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," toRefs"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"(state);\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"count.value"],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"++"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ✅ 响应式正常\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"name.value "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"}," ''React''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"; "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ✅ 同样有效\n"]]]],["p",{},["strong",{},"toRefs 的原理："]],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"function toRefs(obj) {\n  const result = {};\n  for (const key in obj) {\n    result[key] = {\n      get value() { return obj[key]; },\n      set value(v) { obj[key] = v; }\n    };\n  }\n  return result;\n}\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"function"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," toRefs"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"s9osk"},"obj"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},") {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"  const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," result"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," {};\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"  for"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," ("],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," key"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," in"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," obj) {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"    result[key] "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"      get"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," value"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"() { "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"return"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," obj[key]; },\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"      set"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," value"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"s9osk"},"v"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},") { obj[key] "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," v; }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"    };\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"  return"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," result;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"}\n"]]]],["p",{},"本质上就是把 reactive 对象的每个属性都转成 ref。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"为什么会有这种设计"},"为什么会有这种设计"],["p",{},"理解设计动机，比死记硬背更重要："],["h3",{"id":"_1-proxy-适合对象ref-适合单值"},"1. Proxy 适合对象，ref 适合单值"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"reactive"]," 是 Proxy 的包装，天然适合复杂对象"],["li",{},["code",{},"ref"]," 是 getter/setter 的包装，适合原始值和简单场景"]],["h3",{"id":"_2-组合式-api-的灵活性"},"2. 组合式 API 的灵活性"],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"// 用 ref 更灵活\nconst count = ref(0);\nconst double = computed(() => count.value * 2);\n\n// 用 reactive 更结构化\nconst state = reactive({\n  count: 0,\n  double: computed(() => state.count * 2)\n});\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 用 ref 更灵活\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," count"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," double"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," computed"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"(() "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"=>"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," count.value "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"*"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," 2"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 用 reactive 更结构化\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," state"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  count: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  double: "],["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"computed"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"(() "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"=>"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," state.count "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"*"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," 2"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},")\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"});\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"_3-解构丢失响应性是-proxy-的副作用"},"3. 解构丢失响应性是 Proxy 的副作用"],["p",{},"不是 Vue 的 bug，是语言特性决定的。Vue 提供 ",["code",{},"toRefs"]," 来解决，而不是改变 Proxy 的行为。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"实际使用建议"},"实际使用建议"],["h3",{"id":"什么时候用-ref"},"什么时候用 ref？"],["ul",{},["li",{},"原始值（string、number、boolean）"],["li",{},"需要替换整个对象时"],["li",{},"逻辑独立、可复用的状态"]],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"// 计数器\nconst count = ref(0);\n\n// 异步数据\nconst user = ref(null);\nuser.value = await fetchUser();\n\n// 组合式函数返回\nexport function useMouse() {\n  const x = ref(0);\n  const y = ref(0);\n  // ...\n  return { x, y };\n}\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 计数器\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," count"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 异步数据\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," user"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"null"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"user.value "],["span",{"class":"snl16"},"="],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," await"],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," fetchUser"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"();\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"  const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," x"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"  // ...\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"  return"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"}," { x, y };\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"}\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"什么时候用-reactive"},"什么时候用 reactive？"],["ul",{},["li",{},"复杂对象，多个相关属性"],["li",{},"表单数据"],["li",{},"需要深层响应式的场景"]],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"// 表单\nconst form = reactive({\n  name: '''',\n  email: '''',\n  age: 0\n});\n\n// 复杂状态\nconst store = reactive({\n  user: null,\n  posts: [],\n  loading: false\n});\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 表单\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," form"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  name: "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  email: "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  age: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"});\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 复杂状态\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," store"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  user: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"null"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  posts: [],\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  loading: "],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"false\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"});\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"混合使用"},"混合使用"],["p",{},"实际项目中经常是混着用的："],["pre",{"className":"language-javascript shiki shiki-themes github-dark","code":"const state = reactive({\n  user: ref(null),        // ref 包对象\n  count: ref(0),          // ref 包原始值\n  settings: {            // reactive 嵌套\n    theme: ''dark'',\n    lang: ''zh''\n  }\n});\n\n// 访问时\nstate.user.value;        // ref 需要 .value\nstate.settings.theme;    // reactive 直接访问\n","language":"javascript","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"snl16"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"}," state"],["span",{"class":"snl16"}," ="],["span",{"class":"svObZ"}," reactive"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"({\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  user: "],["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"null"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"),        "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ref 包对象\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  count: "],["span",{"class":"svObZ"},"ref"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"("],["span",{"class":"sDLfK"},"0"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"),          "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ref 包原始值\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  settings: {            "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// reactive 嵌套\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"    theme: "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''dark''"],["span",{"class":"s95oV"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"    lang: "],["span",{"class":"sU2Wk"},"''zh''\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"  }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"});\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// 访问时\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"state.user.value;        "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// ref 需要 .value\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"s95oV"},"state.settings.theme;    "],["span",{"class":"sAwPA"},"// reactive 直接访问\n"]]]],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"面试常见问题"},"面试常见问题"],["h3",{"id":"q1-ref-和-reactive-的区别"},"Q1: ref 和 reactive 的区别？"],["p",{},["strong",{},"基础回答："]],["blockquote",{},["p",{},"ref 可以包任意类型，通过 .value 访问；reactive 只能包对象，直接访问属性。"]],["p",{},["strong",{},"进阶回答："]],["blockquote",{},["p",{},"两者底层实现不同。reactive 基于 Proxy，适合复杂对象；ref 基于 getter/setter，适合原始值。reactive 解构会丢失响应性，因为解构出来的是普通值；ref 只要保持引用就能保持响应性。"]],["h3",{"id":"q2-为什么-reactive-解构会丢失响应性"},"Q2: 为什么 reactive 解构会丢失响应性？"],["p",{},["strong",{},"核心要点："]],["ul",{},["li",{},"Proxy 代理的是整个对象"],["li",{},"解构是值拷贝，不是引用传递"],["li",{},["code",{},"const { count } = state"]," 等价于 ",["code",{},"const count = state.count"]],["li",{},"这时候 count 只是一个数字，和 Proxy 没关系了"]],["h3",{"id":"q3-怎么解决-reactive-解构问题"},"Q3: 怎么解决 reactive 解构问题？"],["ul",{},["li",{},"用 ",["code",{},"toRefs"]," 转换"],["li",{},"或者直接使用 ",["code",{},"ref"]],["li",{},"避免不必要的解构"]],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"总结"},"总结"],["table",{},["thead",{},["tr",{},["th",{},"特性"],["th",{},"ref"],["th",{},"reactive"]]],["tbody",{},["tr",{},["td",{},"数据类型"],["td",{},"任意"],["td",{},"仅对象/数组"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"访问方式"],["td",{},["code",{},".value"]],["td",{},"直接访问"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"解构响应性"],["td",{},"保持（引用）"],["td",{},"丢失"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"底层实现"],["td",{},"getter/setter"],["td",{},"Proxy"]],["tr",{},["td",{},"适用场景"],["td",{},"原始值、简单状态"],["td",{},"复杂对象、表单"]]]],["p",{},["strong",{},"核心理解："]],["ol",{},["li",{},"Vue 3 响应式基于 Proxy + track/trigger"],["li",{},"reactive 是深层对象代理，ref 是单值包装"],["li",{},"解构 reactive 会丢失响应性，推荐用 toRefs"],["li",{},"根据场景选择，不要死板"]],["p",{},"理解这些底层原理，可以让你在写组合式 API 或 Pinia 状态管理时更加自如。"],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"参考"},"参考"],["ul",{},["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://vuejs.org/guide/extras/reactivity-in-depth.html","rel":["nofollow"]},"Vue 3 响应式原理"]],["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://developer.mozilla.org/zh-CN/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Proxy","rel":["nofollow"]},"Proxy - MDN"]],["li",{},["a",{"href":"https://github.com/vuejs/core/tree/main/packages/reactivity","rel":["nofollow"]},"Vue 3 源码"]]],["hr",{}],["p",{},"有问题欢迎交流。"],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .snl16, html
